response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified a dialogue segment (00:00-01:44) followed by a song performance (01:44-04:30). 2. Detected song title 'お人形' (Oningyou) and creator '白石誠実' (Shiraishi Seimi) from on-screen credits. 3. Performed web search 'お人形 白石誠実 lyrics' to retrieve lyrics in original language and English. 4. Compiled data into JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video of two virtual YouTubers (Akai Haato and Haachama) having a short dialogue followed by a performance of the song 'Oningyou' ('Doll').

scenes.description: Two virtual YouTuber characters having a dialogue in front of a tree.
The characters perform the song 'Oningyou'. On-screen text indicates the title and credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
La, la-la-la
La, la-la-la
ねえ見て お気に入りの、
世界に一つの、お人形さん
顔も性格も、違ったけど
ずっとみんな、なかよし。

「苦しい」を教わったとき、
私にもできた 恩返し
大事な人、好きな人
いつもそばにいて ほしい、よね。

上手に縫ってね、私にしてくれたように。
少しほつれたとこも、
めちゃ 可愛いね。

体をたくさん、好きに繋ぎ合わせて。
少しいびつだけども、
大切な 家族たちなの。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
La, la-la-la
La, la-la-la
Hey, look at my favorite
One and only doll
Our faces and personalities were different, but
We've always been good friends.

When I was taught what "pain" is,
I was also able to return the favor
Important person, person I like
I always want you by my side, right?

Sew me up skillfully, just like you did for me.
Even the parts that are a little frayed,
Are so cute, aren't they?

Connecting my body as you like
Even if it's a little misshapen,
They are my precious family.
